The '''WA-2 waitress droid''' was a line of [[Service droid/Legends|serving]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. One such model was employed as a [[Waiter/Legends|waitress]] at [[Panky's]] diner on the [[planet]] [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]]<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].<ref name="OF Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
WA-2 waitress droids appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
